summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of Express Banners /media endpoint. All core functionality working correctly - returns JSON not HTML, proper error handling, route ordering correct.
passed_tests: GET /media?folder=expressbanners/catalogue&max=5 returns 500 JSON (expected without Cloudinary env vars)
GET /media without folder param returns 400 JSON error
/media route registered BEFORE * SPA fallback in server.js
server/lib/cloudinary.js listByPrefix function exists and exported
Frontend fetchMedia function exists in js/app.js
Frontend FOLDER_MAP with correct mappings exists
Frontend loadCloudinaryMedia and loadServiceMedia functions exist
Frontend localStorage cache with 12h TTL implemented
Services page has all 5 data-service-media blocks with data-service attributes
All HTML pages load without JavaScript syntax errors
No single image URL pattern across all img tags (8 unique URLs for 21 images)
Backend /media Content-Type: application/json header set correctly
